title: exocarpos montanus
intro: Exocarpos montanus, commonly known as the quandong, is a small, deciduous tree native to the arid regions of Western Australia. The quandong tree has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, due to its high tannin content. The health benefits of consuming quandong include the potential reduction of inflammation, improvement of cardiovascular health, and antioxidant properties that may aid in protecting against cell damage. Quandong is often used to prepare various herbal products, including teas, jams, and supplements, which are available in different forms and concentrations.
